description: A complete partnership (MOU) data dict (all 23 required fields incl. a non-empty CLAUSES list-of-dict) passes field-presence validation.

data.SUBJECT: Memorandum of Understanding - sovereign DPI+ collaboration
data.PURPOSE_HTML: The parties intend to collaborate on sovereign deep packet intelligence deployments.
data.SCOPE_HTML: Joint technical evaluation, reference architecture, and a co-marketing pilot.
data.GOVERNANCE_HTML: A joint steering committee meets quarterly to review progress.

CLAUSES.title: Term
CLAUSES.body: This MOU is effective for 24 months from the effective date.

CLAUSES.title: Confidentiality
CLAUSES.body: Each party maintains the confidentiality of the other's information.
